candidates.why: Component of revenue but not the full top-line; a broader aggregate revenue measure exists as Total income.
Seems to be a component of non-interest income; not the comprehensive revenue line.
Niche income component, not overall revenue.
Insurance-specific revenue component; overall bank group revenue is better represented by Total income.
Likely an insurance premium revenue component, not total group revenue.
Component of insurance revenue, not consolidated top-line.
Represents the consolidated top-line including net interest income and net other operating income; best proxy for total revenue for a bank.
Appears to be a special/non-recurring income item not comprehensive revenue.

candidates.row_label: Items that will not be reclassified to the income statement
candidates.why: Part of OCI, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Earnings measure after expenses and taxes, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Currency translation reserve reclassified to the income statement
candidates.why: OCI recycling item, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Hedging reserve reclassified to the income statement
candidates.why: OCI hedging item, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Tax reclassified to the income statement
candidates.why: Tax effect of OCI, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Items that  subsequently be reclassified to the income statement
candidates.why: OCI category, not revenue.
Includes net income plus OCI; not revenue.
Likely a component of interest income; partial, not total revenue.
Trading income component; not comprehensive revenue.
Balance sheet item, not an income statement revenue line.

variables.notes: Total income is the consolidated banking top-line including net interest and non-interest income; other candidates are components or non-revenue items.

candidates.why: Direct costs associated with fee and commission income; good proxy for direct service costs (COGS-like) for a bank.
Direct cost against Insurance revenue; very strong candidate for COGS for insurance operations.
Appears to be overhead/operating expenses rather than direct production costs; better classed as SG&A, not COGS.

candidates.row_label: Operating expenses on properties and premises
candidates.why: Overhead (rent, maintenance) not direct COGS.
Marketing overhead (SG&A), not COGS.
Primarily SG&A for a bank, not direct COGS; staff costs are more overhead-like here.
Supplemental disclosure of advertising SG&A, not COGS.
Lease/occupancy costs, overhead not direct COGS.
Generic insurance expense label with no clear link to revenue in this preview; less specific than Insurance service expense.
Balance sheet liability, not a P&L cost line.

variables.notes: Insurance service expense is the clearest direct cost of insurance revenue; commission and fee expenses are direct costs against fee income. Both provided in priority order for COGS-like treatment.

candidates.why: Net income line, not an expense; should not be treated as SG&A.

candidates.row_label: Operating expenses on properties and premises
candidates.why: Typical SG&A component (occupancy costs). Suitable as part of SG&A.
Core SG&A component (personnel costs). Strong SG&A candidate.
Balance sheet liability, not a P&L expense line; not appropriate for SG&A selection.

final_choice.row_label: Operating expenses on properties and premises

variables.notes: Using multiple SG&A components per instructions: personnel and property-related operating expenses. Excluding net other operating income and balance sheet items.

candidates.why: An impairment charge on capitalized development costs; related to R&D assets but not the core recurring R&D expense line.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Explicit recurring expense for amortization of capitalized R&D; best available proxy for R&D expense.
Balance sheet R&D-related asset, not period expense.
Accumulated amortization/impairment on balance sheet; not current-period R&D expense.
Balancing/bucket line on the balance sheet; not an expense line.

final_choice.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental

variables.notes: Company reports R&D-related expense only via amortization of capitalized R&D; selected as XRD per guidance.

candidates.row_label: Interest on amounts due from credit institutions
candidates.why: Interest income component, not expense; not suitable as XINT which is defined as interest expense.
Major interest income component; not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest on impaired loans and guarantees
candidates.why: Additional interest income/expense on impaired items; ambiguous but small and not main expense line.

candidates.row_label: Interest on commercial paper and bonds at fair value
candidates.why: Interest income from securities; not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest on commercial paper and bonds, held to maturity
candidates.why: Interest income from HTM securities; not expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest on amounts due to credit institutions
candidates.why: Clear interest expense component (funding from other institutions). Good candidate for XINT.
Core interest expense on customer deposits; strong XINT component.
Interest expense on issued debt securities; key part of interest expense.
Interest expense on subordinated debt; part of financing costs.
Income, not expense; not appropriate for XINT.
Residual category of interest expense; good backup for XINT when other lines may be missing.

candidates.row_label: Other Interest expense positive and net
candidates.why: Appears to be another interest expense measure but seems unused (nan); possible alternate label.
Profit attribution, not interest.
Equity attribution, not interest expense.
Generic interest label, likely income; unclear and unused in preview.
Generic banking interest payable label; could represent total interest expense if populated, but appears empty in preview.
Miscellaneous interest income; not expense.
Equity item, not interest.
Equity item, not interest.

final_choice.row_label: Interest on amounts due to credit institutions

variables.notes: XINT is provided as a priority list of interest expense components; later processing can pick the first non-missing per year. Income and equity attribution items are excluded.

candidates.row_label: Profit from investments accounted for by the equity method
candidates.why: Income statement line, not a balance sheet equity total.
Appears to be OCI-related measurement, not total book equity.
Dividend income, not equity balance.

candidates.row_label: Investments accounted for by the equity method
candidates.why: Asset (equity method investees), not shareholders’ equity.
Component of equity, but not total book equity; we prefer full Total equity.
Sub-component of Other equity; not total equity.
Consolidated total equity; good candidate for book equity, but slightly less preferred to the fully labeled Total equity row which includes NCI.
Most explicit and comprehensive total equity figure including all components; best proxy for book equity (BE).

variables.notes: Using Total equity as primary book equity measure, with Total Equity as a backup label.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution of profit to NCI; reflects flow, not stock, but confirms presence of minorities.
Appears to be an income statement aggregation of Tier 1 holders and NCI; again, a flow, not the balance sheet minority interest.
Balance sheet item representing equity attributable to non-controlling interests; strong candidate for MIB.
Duplicate/alias of Non-controlling interests on the balance sheet; also a strong candidate for MIB.

variables.notes: Using balance sheet Minority Interest and Non-controlling interests as the stock measure of minority interest (MIB), in priority order.
